en-US.name: Pigeon Toss: Release Weather
en-US.subtitle: Loft Fly Time by Wind & Fog
en-US.promotional_text: Racing-pigeon fancier? Enter distance, loft bearing, and bird group. Pigeon Toss reads live wind, fog, and sunset to say RELEASE, CAUTION, or HOLD.
en-US.description:
Is it safe to liberate your birds right now? Pigeon Toss turns live weather into one clear answer - RELEASE, CAUTION, or HOLD - for your training toss, based on your distance, your loft, and your birds.

A late toss from a long distance can leave your birds out after dark. A headwind can double the flight time that the same wind, behind them, would halve. Fog leaves them disoriented. The factors exist - wind, visibility, temperature, sunset - but doing the distance-versus-speed-versus-daylight math in your head before every toss is nobody's routine.

HOW IT WORKS

1. Set your loft: release distance, home-line bearing, and bird group.
2. Pigeon Toss pulls live wind, fog, temperature, and sunset for your location.
3. You get a single verdict - RELEASE, CAUTION, or HOLD - with the reason, the estimated time home, and the daylight to spare.

Under a minute to set up. No account required.

CORE FEATURES

Today's Verdict
A single answer plus the why - wind on your line (head or tail), fog, temperature, and the margin before dark, read at a glance instead of guessed.

Time Home and Daylight Margin
See the estimated flight time and how much daylight is left, so you never send birds up too late from too far.

Wind on Your Line
The head or tail component along your home bearing, not just raw wind speed, so you see how today's wind really affects the flight.

PRO FEATURES
Upgrade to Pro for deeper insights:
- Multiple lofts and release points
- Side-by-side verdicts for young, yearling, and old birds
- A distance planner: the farthest distance that stays safe today
- A 7-day release outlook
- A toss log that learns each group's real speed over the season
- Release-window reminders

PRIVACY FIRST
- No account, no login
- All data stored locally on your device
- Location is used only to fetch weather and sunset data from Open-Meteo. Coordinates are never stored on any server.
- No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics

Pigeon Toss provides release guidance based on public weather data and general homing-flight principles. It is a training and husbandry reference tool, not a guarantee of your birds' safe return. It does not involve betting, wagering, or prizes. The final decision to liberate is always yours.

Terms of Use (EULA):
